assumptions: ENGINEERING APPROXIMATION ONLY -- not a certified intact/damage stability, structural, or corrosion assessment.
Conditions are sampled once per timestep and held constant over the step (explicit forward Euler integration of corrosion loss).
Trajectory position uses linear lat/lon interpolation (not great-circle).
Coating is treated as intact; time-dependent coating breakdown is not yet integrated by the engine.
Components corrode independently; galvanic coupling and load redistribution between components are not modeled.
GM is treated as constant; corrosion-driven weight/KG changes are ignored.
